us.
89. If Venus, Mars, Mercury and the Sun join together in the 9th, one will be hard-hearted,
beautiful, interested in valorous acts, be not wealthy and will lose his wealth through his
enemies.
90. If the Sun, Mars, Mercury and Saturn be together in the 9th, one will be interested in others
wives, will incur loss of wealth and be always pitiable.
91. One with the Sun, Venus, Mars and Jupiter in the 9th, will hate people, be troubled by thirst,
will spoil virgins and be fickle-minded.
92. If the Sun, Mars, Jupiter and Saturn are in the 9th at birth, one will be devoid of happiness, be
diligent, fierce and courageous.
93. If the Sun, Jupiter, Venus and Mercury are in the 9th, one will be an excellent person endowed
with wealth, gold and sovereignty.
94. If the Sun, Mercury, Jupiter and Saturn are together in the 9th, one will be devoid of wealth, be
sinful, be interested in other housewives, spiteful and will indulge in mean acts.
95.
